response.justification: The candidate is a very poor fit for this role. The position requires 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform and experience in capital markets or fixed income. The candidate's resume shows only a brief, 7-month C++ role from nearly a decade ago and no subsequent professional C++ work. His primary expertise lies in web technologies like TypeScript/Node.js and the D language. Furthermore, he lacks any experience in the specified financial domains, making him fundamentally unqualified for the mandatory requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior, polyglot software engineer.
Strong background in modern development practices like CI/CD, TDD, and DevOps.
Demonstrates excellent communication and leadership skills through talks, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Virtually no professional C++ experience, falling far short of the 5-10 year requirement.
Lacks experience with development on the Windows platform.
No experience in the required financial domains of Capital Markets or Fixed Income.
